sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: MillerKnoll (MLKN) Q3 2026: revenue grows 6% as EPS turns positive
feed.summary: MillerKnoll (MLKN) reported strong Q3 2026 results with net sales up 5.8% to $926.6 million and dilute EPS turning positive to $0.34 from a year-ago loss. All segments saw revenue growth, driven by price increases, increased sales volumes, and favorable currency translation. The company's profitability rebound was significantly aided by the absence of prior-year non-cash impairment charges, although adjusted diluted EPS slightly decreased.

feed.title: MillerKnoll Reports Third Quarter Fiscal Results
feed.summary: MillerKnoll Inc. reported solid third-quarter fiscal year 2026 results with net sales up 5.8% and orders up 9.2%, driven by growth in North America Contract and Global Retail segments. The company's operating margin improved significantly year-over-year, and it maintained strong liquidity, declaring a quarterly cash dividend of $0.1875 per share. CEO Andi Owen highlighted the strength of their diversified portfolio and their focus on disciplined execution and operational priorities despite macroeconomic uncertainties.

feed.title: MNDY Investor Alert: monday.com Ltd. Securities Fraud
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert regarding a securities fraud lawsuit against monday.com Ltd. (NASDAQ: MNDY). The lawsuit alleges the company overstated its revenue trajectory by projecting $1.8 billion in revenue by fiscal year 2027, only to retract this target less than five months later. This led to a significant drop in MNDY's stock price, and investors who suffered losses may be entitled to compensation with a lead plaintiff deadline of May 11, 2026.

feed.title: Moelis & Co (NYSE: MC) COO granted additional dividend-equivalent RSUs
feed.summary: Moelis & Co Chief Operating Officer Katherine Pilcher Ciafone was granted additional dividend-equivalent RSUs as part of her equity compensation. She received 16.48 2021 incentive RSUs and 46.89 2022 incentive RSUs, which will vest concurrently with her existing unvested incentive RSUs. These awards are routine compensation and not open-market transactions.

feed.title: AI Investing Insights - Official Homepage - Intellectia AI™
feed.summary: This page from Intellectia AI provides an overview for the MIY ETF, including its price data, a brief navigation to technical analysis and news, and mentions Intellectia AI as a platform for winning trades. The site also lists various AI-powered tools and market analysis features offered by Intellectia AI. It appears to be a company page rather than a detailed article.

feed.title: Levi & Korsinsky Reminds Ramaco Resources, Inc. Investors of the Pending Class Action Lawsuit with a Lead Plaintiff Deadline of March 31, 2026 - METC
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has notified investors of Ramaco Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ: METC) about a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that defendants made false statements and concealed information regarding the development progress at the Brook Mine, impacting investors who suffered losses between July 31, 2025, and October 23, 2025. Investors have until March 31, 2026, to request to be appointed as lead plaintiff, with no out-of-pocket costs to participate.

feed.title: Veradermics (NYSE: MANE) bets on oral minoxidil for pattern hair loss
feed.summary: Veradermics (NYSE: MANE) is a late clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focusing on developing VDPHL01, an extended-release oral minoxidil for treating pattern hair loss (PHL) in both men and women. The company is conducting three registration-directed, placebo-controlled trials for VDPHL01. Veradermics estimates the U.S. PHL treatment market at approximately $9 billion annually and plans a cash-pay, multi-channel commercial strategy, leveraging its patent protection expected to extend into at least 2043.

feed.title: Director at Pfizer (NYSE: PFE) receives phantom stock unit grant
feed.summary: Pfizer director Cyrus Taraporevala was granted 1,386.834 phantom stock units, valued at $27.04 per unit, bringing his total holdings to 27,139.547 units. These units are part of deferred director compensation, including dividend equivalents, and will be settled in cash or common stock upon his retirement from the Board. This transaction is classified as a compensation and deferral event rather than an open-market trade.

feed.title: Kenvue Inc (KVUE) Stock Price Quote Today & Current Price Chart
feed.summary: This article provides current stock price information and trading conditions for Kenvue Inc. (KVUE), the consumer health spin-off of Johnson & Johnson. It outlines CFD trading details such as spread, overnight funding adjustments, and commission, alongside key financial stats like previous close and 1-year change. The company is highlighted for its iconic brands and stable cash flows.

feed.title: Seeking Shields from Volatility? 2 Stocks Worth a Look
feed.summary: Amidst recent stock market volatility, particularly affecting tech stocks, Zacks Investment Research suggests focusing on stable, less flashy businesses like Hershey (HSY) and PepsiCo (PEP). Both companies have outperformed the S&P 500 in 2026, boast strong earnings outlooks and consistent dividend payouts, making them attractive options for investors seeking stability. These "boring" stocks provide a shield against market fluctuations through their established business models and shareholder returns.

feed.title: GE HealthCare Technologies Inc (GEHC) Stock Price Down 3.23% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Shares of GE HealthCare Technologies Inc (GEHC) dropped 3.23% on March 30, closing at $69.23. This is 22.88% below its 52-week high but 20.09% above its 52-week low. Analysts forecast an average target price of $93.12 for GEHC, implying a 34.50% upside, and GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $88.97, suggesting a 28.51% upside.

feed.title: Entergy Corp (ETR) Shares Up 6.82% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Entergy Corp (ETR) shares rose by 6.82% on March 30, closing at $109.88. This places the stock just below its 52-week high, with significantly higher than average trading volume. Wall Street analysts maintain an "Outperform" rating with an average price target of $110.44, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $64.87, suggesting a potential downside.

feed.title: ConnectM Delays Annual 10-K Filing Briefly
feed.summary: ConnectM Technology Solutions has announced a delay in filing its annual Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The delay is attributed to needing additional time for financial close documentation, and the company expects to file within the 15-day extension period, anticipating no major changes in its financial results. An analyst currently rates CNTM as a Hold with a $0.40 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, also provides a Neutral rating, citing challenging financial performance balanced by positive technical indicators.

feed.title: [Form 4] Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp. (MCB) executive Scott Lublin, EVP and Chief Lending Officer, had 3,025 shares of common stock withheld to cover tax withholding obligations. These shares were valued at $80.65 each. Following this transaction, Lublin directly holds 57,905 shares of common stock, which includes various tranches of restricted stock units.

feed.title: Entergy Corporation (ETR) Announces Leadership Transition with New Chief Accounting Officer Patrick J. Stack to Succeed Reginald T. Jackson as Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer
feed.summary: Entergy Corporation (ETR) has announced that Reginald T. Jackson, current Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer, will retire on May 31, 2026. Patrick J. Stack, age 53, who has served as Corporate Controller since March 2022, will succeed him as Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer starting June 1, 2026. Stack will receive an annual base salary of $356,000, along with eligibility for a 45% annual cash bonus and various stock awards.

feed.title: Assessing Verizon (VZ) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Debt Concerns
feed.summary: Verizon Communications (VZ) has experienced mixed recent share price performance, with a small daily decline alongside positive monthly and quarterly returns, bringing its current share price to $50.30. Despite a widely followed narrative suggesting it is undervalued with a fair value estimate around $50.76, concerns exist regarding high network investment and its US$116 billion net unsecured debt. Investors are advised to review the data themselves, focusing on key risks and rewards, and consider other investment opportunities beyond just telecom stocks.

feed.title: 157,943 stock options granted to Molson Coors (NYSE: TAP) CEO
feed.summary: Molson Coors Beverage Co (NYSE: TAP) CEO, Rahul Goyal, was granted 157,943 Employee Stock Options for Class B Common Stock with an exercise price of $47.33 per share. This grant is a correction to a previous filing, rectifying a calculation error. The options will vest in full on March 4, 2029, and expire on March 4, 2036, representing a compensation-related award rather than an open-market transaction.

feed.title: Molson Coors (NYSE: TAP) corrects and details 40,614-option grant to CLO
feed.summary: Molson Coors Beverage Co. has filed an amended Form 4/A to correct a previous error regarding an option grant to its Chief Legal Officer, Natalie G. Maciolek. The filing confirms a grant of 40,614 employee stock options for Class B common stock with an exercise price of $47.33 per share. These options, which vest in full on March 4, 2029, will expire on March 4, 2036.

feed.title: Molson Coors (TAP) executive awarded 33,845 stock options at $47.33 strike
feed.summary: Molson Coors (TAP) executive Philip M. Whitehead was granted 33,845 employee stock options for Class B Common Stock with an exercise price of $47.33 per share. This information comes from an amended Form 4/A filing, which corrected a calculation error in a previous report, clarifying that the grant was compensation rather than a market transaction. The options will vest entirely and become exercisable on March 4, 2029, and are set to expire on March 4, 2036.

feed.title: Molson Coors (TAP) CIO receives 13,538 Class B stock options at $47.33
feed.summary: Molson Coors Beverage Co's Chief Information Officer, Darrin Vohs, was granted 13,538 employee stock options for Class B Common Stock with an exercise price of $47.33 per share. This grant was an amendment to a previous filing, correcting a calculation error from the award made on March 4, 2026. The options will vest in full and become exercisable on March 4, 2029, and are set to expire on March 4, 2036.

feed.title: Molson Coors (NYSE: TAP) CFO awarded 54,152 stock options at $47.33 strike
feed.summary: Molson Coors Beverage Co.'s CFO, Tracey Joubert, received a grant of 54,152 employee stock options for Class B Common Stock with an exercise price of $47.33 per share. These options, which correct a prior misreported amount, vest in full on March 4, 2029, and will expire on March 4, 2036. This transaction is a compensation-related award, not an open-market purchase, and represents her full position from this specific grant.

feed.title: Pfizer (NYSE: PFE) director receives deferred phantom stock award
feed.summary: Pfizer director James Quincey was granted 1,433.062 phantom stock units as deferred board compensation on March 27, 2026, valued at $27.04 per unit. This award increased his total holding to 77,317.538 phantom units, which represent deferred compensation including dividend equivalents. These units will be settled in cash or common stock at his election upon his retirement from the Board.

feed.title: KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) Short Interest Up 23.3% in March
feed.summary: Short interest in KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) significantly increased by 23.3% in March, reaching over 10.8 million shares, indicating a rise in bearish sentiment with a low days-to-cover ratio of 1.2. Despite this, company insiders, including CEOs Scott C. Nuttall and Joseph Y. Bae, made substantial stock purchases, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price significantly above the current trading value. The company also recently paid a quarterly dividend of $0.185 per share.

feed.title: Lexeo Therapeutics Advances Cardiac Gene Therapies, Strengthens Finances
feed.summary: Lexeo Therapeutics updated its Q4 and full-year 2025 results, detailing advancements in its cardiac gene therapy pipeline and a strengthened financial position. The company ended 2025 with $246.6 million in cash, expected to fund operations into 2028, and made significant progress with LX2006 for Friedreich ataxia and LX2020 for PKP2 arrhythmogenic cardiomyopathy, including positive interim data and regulatory interactions. Lexeo also enhanced its leadership and collaborated with Johnson & Johnson, solidifying its position in cardiovascular genetic medicine despite an AI analyst ranking it as "Neutral" due to financial performance.

feed.title: Investor Notice: Robbins LLP Informs Investors of the Vital Farms, Inc. Class Action Lawsuit
feed.summary: Robbins LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Vital Farms, Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased securities between May 8, 2025, and February 26, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Vital Farms misled investors regarding the implementation of its ERP system, which resulted in shipment and production delays and negatively impacted the company's financial performance. Investors are encouraged to contact Robbins LLP to learn more about participating in the class action.

It also lists key statistics like previous close, open price, 1-year change, and day's range. Additionally, the page includes recent articles related to other company stock forecasts and customer reviews for the trading platform.

feed.title: Director at LGL Group (NYSE: LGL) receives 2,067-share stock grant
feed.summary: LGL Group director Manjit Kalha was granted 2,067 shares of common stock as equity compensation on March 26, 2026. These shares, valued at $0.00 each, will vest three years from the grant date, on March 26, 2029. Following this transaction, Kalha directly holds 32,060 shares of LGL Group common stock.

feed.title: [Form 4] LGL GROUP INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: LGL Group Inc. director Kaan Kerem Aslansan reported acquiring 2,067 shares of common stock as compensation through a Form 4 filing. These shares were granted at $0.00 per share and will vest over three years from March 26, 2026, becoming fully earned on March 26, 2029. Following this transaction, Aslansan directly holds 7,249 shares of LGL common stock.

feed.title: Lotus Technology Launches X-Hybrid ‘For Me’ Hyper SUV in China
feed.summary: Lotus Technology has launched its new For Me hyper SUV (known as Eletre X in Europe) in Beijing, China, on March 29, 2026. This is the first mass-produced Lotus to utilize the X-Hybrid Architecture, offering 952 horsepower, an electric range of 420km, and a total range exceeding 1,400km. Despite the advanced features and performance, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates LOT stock as "Neutral" due to poor financial performance and negative profitability.

feed.title: Lulus Highlights Improved Margins and Profitability Amid Revenue Decline
feed.summary: Lulu's Fashion Lounge Holdings (LVLU) reported improved profitability metrics for Q4 and full-year 2025, with gross margins increasing and net loss narrowing, despite a decline in net revenue and active customers. The company aims for positive Adjusted EBITDA in 2026 through continued focus on margin optimization, cost controls, and a sharper product assortment, including a significant reduction in authorized shares subject to shareholder approval. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates LVLU as Neutral, noting weak financial performance offset by technical momentum and anticipated improvements in adjusted EBITDA.

feed.title: Short Interest in Standard BioTools Inc. (NASDAQ:LAB) Declines By 18.5%
feed.summary: Short interest in Standard BioTools Inc. (NASDAQ:LAB) decreased by 18.5% in March, totaling 8,281,198 shares as of March 13th. Institutional investors now own about 53.74% of the stock, with several large investors increasing their stakes. The company recently beat revenue and EPS estimates but remains unprofitable, with analysts holding a consensus "Reduce" rating and a target price of $1.35.

feed.title: 36Kr (KRKR) Chief Content Officer details vested options and ADS holdings
feed.summary: 36Kr Holdings Inc.'s Chief Content Officer, Li Yang Sylvia, has updated her ownership details, revealing her current holdings in vested employee share options and American Depositary Securities (ADSs). The filing shows she holds options expiring in 2029 and 2031, covering a total of 1,165,435 Class A ordinary shares, all fully vested and exercisable at a nominal price. Additionally, she directly holds 1,642 ADSs, which originated from previously exercised options.

feed.title: Cathie Wood’s ARK sells Teradyne stock, buys CoreWeave
feed.summary: Cathie Wood's ARK ETFs executed strategic trades on Monday, March 30, 2026, selling 29,130 shares of Teradyne (NASDAQ: TER) for over $8.6 million, continuing a trend of reducing its position. Concurrently, ARK made significant purchases, including 41,830 shares of CoreWeave (CRWV) worth over $3.1 million, reflecting confidence in the company, and also invested in Oklo Inc. and GeneDx Holdings Corp., and increased its stake in DoorDash Inc. The moves indicate ARK's nuanced approach and focus on technology and innovation-driven sectors.

feed.title: Exclusive | Unilever Nears Deal to Create $60 Billion Food Giant With McCormick
feed.summary: Unilever is reportedly in advanced talks to merge its food business with spice giant McCormick, potentially creating a new food conglomerate valued at approximately $60 billion, including debt. A cash-and-stock deal could be announced as early as Tuesday, coinciding with McCormick's quarterly earnings report. The boards of both companies are reviewing the transaction details.

feed.title: American Express named official payments partner of NFL
feed.summary: American Express has signed a multi-year deal to become the official payments partner of the National Football League, starting with the 2026 season. This partnership will provide Amex cardholders with exclusive benefits such as ticket presales and on-site experiences at major NFL events, and replaces Visa's three-decade-long sponsorship. The move expands American Express's sports marketing portfolio, reinforcing its brand strategy.

feed.title: Molson Coors (NYSE: TAP) director awarded 2,257 options at $47.33 strike
feed.summary: Molson Coors Beverage Co director Peter Joseph Coors was granted 2,257 employee stock options for Class B Common Stock with an exercise price of $47.33 per share. These options are a compensation award, not an open-market purchase, and will vest in full on March 4, 2029, expiring on March 4, 2036. This filing is an amendment to a previous Form 4, correcting a calculation error in the number of options reported.

feed.title: Xcel Energy electric, gas rates expected to rise across Summit County by August
feed.summary: Xcel Energy plans to increase electric and gas rates for Summit County residents by about $10 per month, with changes taking effect in August. These increases are attributed to clean energy investments, infrastructure upgrades, and the rising energy demands from large data centers. Xcel Energy aims to meet Colorado's carbon emission reduction mandates, expecting an 88% reduction by 2030, which involves significant investments in renewable energy and transmission infrastructure.

feed.title: Cathie Wood’s ARK sells Teradyne stock, buys CoreWeave By Investing.com
feed.summary: Cathie Wood's ARK Invest has strategically rebalanced its portfolio by selling Teradyne Inc. shares, amounting to over $8.6 million, continuing a trend of reducing its position in the company. Concurrently, ARK made a significant acquisition of CoreWeave Inc. shares totaling over $3.1 million, reflecting confidence in the company's potential. Additional investments were made in Oklo Inc., GeneDx Holdings Corp., and DoorDash Inc., while Veracyte Inc. holdings were further divested.

feed.title: Before its Einride merger closes, Legato discloses going-concern opinion
feed.summary: Legato Merger Corp. III (LEGT) announced that its audited financial statements for the year ended November 30, 2025, included a going concern explanatory paragraph, as previously disclosed in its Form 10-K. This announcement complies with NYSE American requirements and does not amend its financial statements. The company confirmed that its definitive business combination agreement with Einride AB is still on track, with the merger anticipated to close in the first half of 2026, subject to customary conditions and regulatory approvals.

feed.title: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) Investors: April 20, 2026, Filing Deadline in Securities Fraud Class Action - Contact Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP
feed.summary: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP has filed a securities fraud class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal made false or misleading statements regarding its revenue outlook and growth, particularly after a surprise CEO change and missed earnings in February 2026 led to a significant stock drop. Investors have until April 20, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status to pursue recovery options.

feed.title: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) Investors: April 20, 2026, Filing Deadline in Securities Fraud Class Action - Contact Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP
feed.summary: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP has filed a securities fraud class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal made materially false statements regarding its revenue outlook and growth, minimizing risks, which led to a significant stock drop after a CEO change and missed earnings in February 2026. Investors have until April 20, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status.

feed.title: Insmed Faces Pivotal Year Amid Leadership Share Sales
feed.summary: Insmed (NASDAQ:INSM) is at a critical point with positive clinical trial data for its lung therapy Arikayce, despite significant stock sales by top executives. The company plans to submit regulatory applications for Arikayce in the US and Japan in the second half of 2026, which could significantly boost revenue. While institutional holdings show mixed activity and insider selling raises concerns, analysts generally maintain a positive outlook on the stock.

feed.title: LGL Group Updates CEO Jason Lamb’s Compensation Package
feed.summary: The LGL Group's Board of Directors has approved an updated compensation package for CEO Jason Lamb, effective retroactively to January 5, 2026. The revised terms include an annual base salary of $190,000, in addition to a previously disclosed $60,000 incentive draw. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates LGL as Neutral, noting balance-sheet strength offset by weakening revenue and uneven profitability.

feed.title: Price-Driven Insight from (FLNG) for Rule-Based Strategy
feed.summary: This article from Stock Traders Daily provides a price-driven analysis for Flex Lng Ltd. (NASDAQ: FLNG), indicating a near-term neutral sentiment amidst mid and long-term strength. It details institutional trading strategies including position trading, momentum breakout, and risk hedging, along with multi-timeframe signal analysis. The report highlights support and resistance levels and offers AI-generated signals for informed decision-making.

feed.title: Here's the Reason M-tron Industries, Inc. (MPTI) Declined More Sharply Than the Overall Market
feed.summary: M-tron Industries (MPTI) experienced a 4.11% decline, outperforming the S&P 500's drop but falling behind the Dow Jones. The company is set to release its next financial report, with analysts expecting unchanged EPS and an increase in revenue. Despite a recent rise in stock price over the past month, the stock currently holds a Zacks Rank of #4 (Sell), and its valuation metrics like Forward P/E are higher than the industry average.

feed.title: IFC-managed funds trim Lesaka (NASDAQ: LSAK) stake with 40,439-share sale
feed.summary: IFC-managed funds have reduced their stake in Lesaka Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: LSAK) by selling 40,439 shares over three days in late March 2026. The sales, executed by the IFC African, Latin American and Caribbean Fund, LP, took place at weighted average prices between $4.91 and $4.95 per share. Following these transactions, entities associated with International Finance Corp still hold over 9 million shares, with 5,720,616 shares held indirectly and 3,271,862 directly.

feed.title: EOG Resources (EOG) Gets a Hold from Citi
feed.summary: Citi analyst Scott Gruber maintained a "Hold" rating on EOG Resources (EOG) with a price target of $150.00. The company's shares closed recently at $149.56. EOG Resources reported a quarterly revenue of $5.64 billion and a net profit of $701 million for the quarter ending December 31.

feed.title: JD.com Announces Proposed Offering of CNY-denominated Senior Notes
feed.summary: JD.com, Inc. announced a proposed offering of CNY-denominated senior unsecured notes in offshore transactions. The net proceeds are intended for general corporate purposes, including repayment of existing indebtedness and interest payments. The offering is subject to market conditions, and the notes will not be registered under the U.S. Securities Act.

feed.title: American Rare Earths names former Newmont exec VP, Corporate Development
feed.summary: American Rare Earths has appointed Nick Lissolo as Vice President, Corporate Development and Strategy. Lissolo, formerly of Newmont Corporation, will lead corporate development, portfolio strategy, and capital markets initiatives, especially for the Halleck Creek rare earths project in Wyoming. His extensive experience in large-scale project evaluation and financial planning is expected to be invaluable for the company's growth.

feed.title: AMD Stock Drops 2.9% Amid Sector Volatility
feed.summary: Shares of Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) dropped 2.9% during mid-day trading due to semiconductor sector volatility and concerns over insider selling. Despite this short-term weakness, analysts maintain a bullish long-term outlook for AMD, citing its partnership with Samsung and strong demand in AI and data centers. The stock's performance is seen as an indicator for the broader semiconductor industry.
